I have come up with a whole new theory to explain my 3-74 experience. The basis of it was twofold: anamnesis, regained memory of the distant past and many things, including customs and language involved in it; and anticipation of the future (the fall of the con¬ spirators, St. Sophia, the Xerox letter). What these all have in common is time. I should not have remembered what I remembered, and I should not have precoged what I precoged; the two are of the same warp and woof.
